channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI Raises $40 Billion in Latest Funding Round
item.description: OpenAI raises $40 billion from investors, valuing the company at $300 billion, in its latest funding round led by SoftBank.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Humans as hardware - no, not the name of a new Matrix movie prequel but a shocking idea about human tissue
item.description: Welcome to the Matrix: Japanese researcher wants to use human soft tissue to process data like a computer.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Mozart Meets AI: Detroit Opera House's Latest Production Takes a Leap into the Future
item.description: Yuval Sharon's innovative production of 'Cosi fan tutte' combines Mozart's sublime music with AI technology, raising questions about humanity and consciousness in a 21st-century context.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Talent gap complicates cost-conscious cloud planning
item.description: Enterprises know everything is not moving to the cloud – that was the lesson of 2024, and it triggered some extreme reactions that fueled the cloud repatriation stories we all heard. The lesson for 2025? It’s that some things are, and should be, moving to the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Building resilient and innovative security teams in the age of AI
item.description: The promised land of AI transformation poses a dilemma for security teams as the new technology brings both opportunities and yet more threat. Threat actors are already using AI to write malware, to find vulnerabilities, and to breach defences faster than ever.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Kendrick Lamar, Gracie Abrams and Zoe Saldaña earn Webby Award nominations, along with Nutter Butter
item.description: Kendrick Lamar, Gracie Abrams, Zoe Saldaña and Nutter Butter are among the nominees for this year’s Webby Awards, recognizing the best internet content and creators.
item.dc:creator: Mark Kennedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Copilot+ PCs with AMD or Intel CPUs are finally getting some key AI features in Windows 11 – although I’m starting to doubt Recall will ever happen
item.description: Recall is still MIA, but those with AMD or Intel CPUs in their Copilot+ PC are finally catching up with the functionality available on Snapdragon machines.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CinemaCon 2025 live – expect Superman and Dune news soon from Warner Bros, plus today's biggest reveals: John Wick prequel, new Hunger Games, and Now You See Me: Now You Don't
item.description: CinemaCon 2025 is officially underway – here are all new movie announcements that we've spotted so far.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Remember when developers reigned supreme? The market for software coding goes soft
item.description: It seems like only yesterday when software developers were on top of the world, and anyone with basic coding experience could get multiple job offers. This yesterday, however, was five to six years ago, and developers are no longer the kings and queens of the IT employment hill.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI agents can (and will) be scammed
item.description: Generative AI’s newest superstars — independent-acting agents — are on a tear. Organizations are adopting the technology at a staggering rate because they can use APIs or be embedded with standard apps and automate all kinds of business processes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Bitcoin investor buys an entire SpaceX flight for the ultimate polar adventure
item.description: A bitcoin investor is headed to space with three polar explorers on the first flight to carry people over the North and South poles.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: U.S. seeks to ramp up social media data collection. Here’s what to know about Homeland Security’s plans
item.description: U.S. immigration officials are asking the public and federal agencies to comment on a proposal to collect social media handles from people applying for benefits such as green cards or citizenship, to comply with an executive order from President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Weekend news dump: GSA, SBA, IRS initiate new workforce cuts
item.description: A roundup of news from late Friday afternoon that you may have missed about SBA, GSA reopening the Deferred Resignation Program. The post Weekend news dump: GSA, SBA, IRS initiate new workforce cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: How AI is transforming IDEs into intelligent development assistants
item.description: Ever feel like you’re spending more time squashing bugs than actually building something? You’re not alone—developers spend a whopping 35% of their time debugging and reviewing code instead of writing it. That’s like ordering pizza and only eating the crust.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google Unveils Gemini AI Model 2.5: A New Era in Performance
item.description: Google introduces version 2.5 of its Gemini AI model, boasting improved performance and accuracy through enhanced reasoning capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft sets May end date for Skype after 14-year run
item.description: Microsoft is discontinuing Skype in May after 22 years of service. Kurt the CyberGuy addresses other options for internet-based phone and video service.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiny electric vehicle takes half a parking space
item.description: Toyota's compact electric FT-Me is designed to tackle challenges of city living while offering an accessible and eco-friendly transportation solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
